single.title: Direct Issuance
single.description: Issue micro-credentials directly to one or more earners. Most metadata comes from the template; per-recipient fields are entered below.

fields.gradeHint: Applied to all recipients unless overridden below.
fields.searchPlaceholder: Search earners by name or email
fields.hiddenHint_one: {{count}} earner already holds this credential (non-revoked) and is hidden from the list.
fields.hiddenHint_other: {{count}} earner(s) already hold this credential (non-revoked) and are hidden from the list.
fields.perRecipientHint: Grade and expiry date are optional and set per learner.

toasts.validationError: Pick a micro-credential and at least one earner

bulk.title: Bulk Issuance
bulk.description: Paste a CSV or upload a .csv file to issue many credentials at once.

fields.csvHint: Headers: email, grade, expiryDate. Paste CSV or upload a .csv file (UTF-8).

preview.unmatched_one: {{count}} email does not match an existing earner account and will be skipped.
preview.unmatched_other: {{count}} email(s) do not match an existing earner account and will be skipped.
preview.duplicates_one: {{count}} earner already has an active (non-revoked) credential for this micro-credential and will be skipped.
preview.duplicates_other: {{count}} earner(s) already have an active (non-revoked) credential for this micro-credential and will be skipped.
preview.staffConflicts_one: {{count}} email belongs to issuer staff or admin accounts and will be skipped.
preview.staffConflicts_other: {{count}} email(s) belong to issuer staff or admin accounts and will be skipped.

toasts.noEligible: No CSV rows are eligible for issuance

errors.noAccount: No earner account found for this email
errors.alreadyActive: Earner already has an active (non-revoked) credential for this micro-credential
errors.staffConflict: This account belongs to issuer staff or admin and cannot receive credentials
